project_context.goal: Improve UI/UX of a sparse, stretched data view without framework migration. Preserve cooperative green branding.

theme_and_archetype.justification: Trust, stability, and direct alignment with the existing cooperative green branding.

rules: Use 'tabular-nums' CSS property for all financial figures to ensure alignment.
Never use Inter or generic sans for headings.
Headings should use tracking-tight for a professional feel.
Labels should be uppercase, small, and wide (tracking-[0.1em]).

layout_strategy.pattern: Mode B: Control Room Grid (Bento Grid)
layout_strategy.alignment_rules: Left-align dense data. Use generous internal padding inside cards (p-6) to fix the 'stretched/sparse' feel.

page_header.content: Institution Name/Fiscal Year on left. Published Date and 'Document' button on right.

stat_card.container: bg-white rounded-xl border border-slate-200 shadow-sm p-6 hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-md transition-all duration-200
stat_card.label: text-xs font-semibold text-slate-500 uppercase tracking-wider mb-2

indicator_badge.style: inline-flex items-center px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-wider
indicator_badge.logic: Apply green/yellow/red color classes based on the health of NPA/NPL/Liquidity indicators.

document_button.style: inline-flex items-center justify-center rounded-lg bg-[#047857] px-5 py-2.5 text-sm font-medium text-white shadow-sm hover:bg-[#064e3b] transition-colors
document_button.icon: Add a document/download SVG icon next to the text.

report_note.style: col-span-full mt-6 bg-slate-50 rounded-lg p-4 border border-slate-200 text-sm text-slate-600

instructions_to_main_agent: Inject Tailwind CSS via CDN (`<script src='https://cdn.tailwindcss.com'></script>`) into the legacy PHP file if a build system is not present.
Inject Google Fonts for 'Work Sans' and 'IBM Plex Sans' in the `<head>`.
Refactor the existing sparse data layout into a CSS Grid (`grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-6`).
Group related financial stats (Assets, Deposits, Loans) into prominent `stat_card` designs.
Use distinct visual badges for NPA/NPL/Liquidity to make them scannable.
Ensure all data points and interactive elements include a `data-testid` attribute (e.g., `data-testid='total-assets-value'`).
Maintain the existing PHP variables and logic; strictly update the HTML structure and CSS classes.
